plan.failureSummary: The test failed because the page URL included a deep-link fragment (#playwright-check-suite) which violated a strict equality assertion.
observedIndicators: page.ai succeeded in its objective but the following assertion failed
The only difference between expected and received URLs is the hash fragment (#playwright-check-suite)
The AI clicked a link specifically titled 'Playwright Check Suite' which naturally leads to that anchor
Historical data shows recent failures after a period of success, suggesting a change in how search results are linked

remediationSteps.summary: Relax the URL assertion in the test code.
remediationSteps.details: Change 'expect(page.url()).toEqual(...)' to 'expect(page.url()).toContain(...)' or update the string to include the expected hash fragment to make the test more resilient to deep-linking.

remediationSteps.summary: Retry with cleared cache to confirm mapping.
remediationSteps.details: Run the test with 'clearPageAiCache: true' to ensure the AI mapping is refreshed against the current search result structure, although the primary fix is the assertion.

plan.notes: The AI successfully found and clicked the requested search result. The search engine provided a deep link to the specific section, which is a common and correct behavior. The test's hardcoded expectation for the exact URL without the hash is too brittle.

originalPlaywrightArgs: Checkly dev docs search|Inspect Wiki article history
